docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF NO OPPOS FILED TO MOITON TO DISMISS APPEAL OF ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY RESPONDENT ZURITA, JOSE A

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT JOSE ZURITA MOTION TO DISMISS DEFENDANT'S APPEAL OF THE ODA ISSUED BY THE LABOR COMMISSIONER OR FOR AN ORDER TO POST BOND BY DATE CERTAIN AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON ODA CONTINUED FROM MAY-06-2010 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAY-17-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 17, 2010. DEFENDANT MUST SHOW PROOF OF PAYMENT OF POSTING OF BOND BY THIS DATE OR COURT WILL GRANT PLAINTIFF'S MOTION. LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT JOSE ZURITA Motion to Dismiss Defendant's Appeal of the ODA issued by the Labor Commissioner or for an Order to Post Bond by Date Certain and for Entry of Judgment on ODA.
